summary: A stylized, color-graded edit of an ICE/SRT tactical team's at-large arrest of a Guatemalan man, cutting between a wide shot of camo-clad 'POLICE' operators stacking behind an armored vehicle in the rain, dramatic close-ups of handcuffs being applied, and agents bathed in a cinematic pink/red color wash. The treatment leans on heroic, action-movie framing and lighting rather than raw documentation, glorifying the operators as elite and the arrest as a high-stakes mission. The deliberate color grade, slow cinematic close-ups, and music-bed scoring give it a produced, youth-appeal 'tactical hype' feel rather than a plain bodycam clip.

script.scene: Wide rainy-street shot: a line of camo-clad ICE SRT operators with 'POLICE' plate carriers and helmets stack behind a black armored vehicle near suburban houses; wet pavement reflects light, cinematic gray tone.
An operator in 'POLICE' vest moves up against a pink clapboard house past a 'PRIVATE PROPERTY NO TRESPASSING' sign; frame is washed in a stylized pink/magenta color grade.
Tight close-up of a handcuffed man's hands behind his back in a green shirt as a camo-gloved agent holds evidence/zip ties; shallow-focus, cinematic framing.
A bearded 'SRT'-helmeted operator with an ICE patch escorts the cuffed suspect (green shirt) past a black SUV outside a house with orange fencing.
Dramatic low close-up of an operator's back/plate carrier ('POST-...') lit with a red wash as he leans into a vehicle; narration tag 'We'll talk in the next video.'

notable_text: We'll talk in the next video
